docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEMCHENOK, BORIS $88,853.86 PRINCIPAL, $3,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $8,665.04 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $101,453.90, SEE SCANNED DOC

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2026, DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP) GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER - JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: DAMON CARTER; DEPT. 505 - PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 9:45AM AND CONCLUDING AT 10:03AM.

DECLARATION OF ELAINE JONES TOMBARI IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR PROVE-UP HEARING AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT BORIS NEMCHENOK (TRANSACTION ID # 79300618) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77294430) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NEMCHENOK, BORIS DOES 1 THROUGH 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-18-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-15-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-23-2026
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79300618) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2026 CONTINUED TO AUG-04-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 79300618) AS TO DEFENDANT NEMCHENOK, BORIS

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77294430) TO PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78213172), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC. SERVED DEC-05-2025, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE DEC-24-2025 AS TO DEFENDANT NEMCHENOK, BORIS
